---
id: post-threads-id-move
title: "Move the specified thread to a different forum"
description: "Move the specified thread to a different forum. Only simple title/prefix updates are supported at the same time."
sidebar_label: "Move the specified thread to a different forum"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: api/xenforo-api
custom_edit_url: null
hide_send_button: true
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";

import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";
import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Move the specified thread to a different forum"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/threads/{id}/move"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Move the specified thread to a different forum. Only simple title/prefix updates are supported at the same time.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
